reviews.comment: I was looking for a reasonable place to have my Tint done on my car. This is a car that I used to run errands so I didn't want to spend a lot and I only needed the front 2 windows done because when I purchased it the back windows were already done. I called Frederick Tint and they were actually closed for the day but Sharyn one of the owners took the time to contact me despite them being closed. She was soooooo pleasant and accommodating. They didn't try to sale me more than I needed and when I went to have my tint done the husband who does the tint was soooo personable while still being professional. The great thing was he was done in like 20 minutes. The job was pristine. I WILL BE A REPEAT CUSTOMER and refer anyone that I know.
